full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Explaining the improvement introduced by the ADMM-based method
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: How does the ADMM framework improve optimization of L1-regularized SVM problems?

full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Helped clarify the advantage of decomposing the optimization into smaller subproblems using ADMM.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Cross-checked the explanation with the algorithm description in the paper.
